clusters.justification: These terms delineate limbic and visceromotor networks responsible for processing physiological arousal, valence, and broad emotional reactivity.
This cluster reflects striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry dedicated to calculating subjective value, reinforcing motivated behavior, and guiding cost-benefit decisions.
These terms co-activate within the default mode network, which acts as a transmodal hub for internally directed representations of the self and the socio-emotional states of others.
